description: Phase 17C-17F governance reporting and workbench rules.

business_explanation_templates.ORPHAN_PAYMENT: This payment cannot be linked to an accepted claim header in the prototype. The parent claim must be remediated before UAT testing can include this payment.
business_explanation_templates.SURRENDER_REVIEW: This surrender claim has offset/residual activity that requires business review before it can enter the UAT candidate population.
business_explanation_templates.UNBALANCED_CLAIM: Financial components for this claim do not balance within tolerance. Business or rule refinement is required before UAT inclusion.
business_explanation_templates.RECONCILIATION_FAIL: Claim header and payment totals do not reconcile. This claim is held from UAT until reconciliation passes.
business_explanation_templates.UAT_CLEARED: This record passed governance checks and is cleared for UAT candidate testing.
